summary: M338 — map + dungeon. Dungeon nodes: anchor-aware return path (was using gs.nodeId which had already moved to the dungeon entry, so 'give up' looped back into the dungeon). Visible error fallback if dungeonId is missing or DungeonScreen import fails. Map layout rewrite — _layoutZoneToFTLGrid now caps each node's outgoing exits at 3 (preferring the spatially closest), pins the boss to (COLS-1, mid-row), classifies thru-nodes by 'reaches boss' set, places thrus along a centred trunk with ≤2-row vertical drift between adjacent columns, and places one-offs in the SAME column as their parent at parent.row ± 1 so detours read as off-lane. Fewer cross-screen connections, no node should branch to more than 3 destinations. Empty Thornwood node investigation queued for M339 — needs in-game save-state inspection.
